base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of blade_trap_dash — a effect_layer from 1986 legend of zelda. Blade Trap — 4 spike-blades at corners of rooms. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Blade Trap — 4 spike-blades at corners of rooms; dash across room when Link aligns with them. Static sprite, movement is position-driven
